column1: You will ... go to the country if you have passed your last exam.
We will ... pass to the next exercise if we have done this one.
I ... give you my book for a couple of days.
You won't ... take part in this serious swimming competition until you have mastered good skills.
My brother ... come and help you in the garden.
The fire spread throughout the building very quickly but everyone ... escape.
They didn't want to come with us at first but in the end we ... persuade them.
